Off Calendar Oct-31-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Aug-15-2022 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-15-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Daphne Lin, via Zoom, for William A. Stevens, Petitioner.

The court confirms that there are no appearances to object to the instant petition or, to the court taking the petition for final distribution filed by the deceased executor, off calendar. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters Testamentary. William A Stevens is appointed Successor Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Amy Harrington remains probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on the filing of the deceased Executor's final account or final report on waiver of account is set for Oct-31-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Status on close of estate is set for Aug-28-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. The petition for final distribution filed by the deceased executor is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
